_README: Labeled gold set for analyzer accuracy scoring (precision/recall). Populate 'expected_remediation_ids' with the remediation_id values that the analyzer SHOULD produce for each fixture, based on human review. Use 'must_not_contain_remediation_ids' to assert false-positive guards. Run scorer with: python tests/score_accuracy.py. To discover the remediation_ids a fixture currently produces, run the analyzer manually and inspect Finding.remediation_id values; then trim/curate to true positives only.

ee2c6c4b-Corrected_Sample_Doc_for_Agent_._note: Author-corrected sample. Should be near-clean. Confirm via review.

0e37b332-Sample_Doc_for_Agent_Testing_-_._note: Known issues sample (alt text, contrast, headings). Fill in after manual review.
